metaData.Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Sugar, Rice Flour, Soya Flour, Edible Vegetable Oil, Raising Agents (INS500ii, INS541, INS341i), Dextrose, Salt, Milk Solids, Calcium Carbonate (INS170i)
metaData.Key Information: Weekend mornings are for pancakes! Perfect your Saturday mornings by getting your pancakes ready faster with the Betty Crocker Pancake Mix!Quit worrying about the hassle which comes with making pancakes. Say no more to doing the dirty dishes or creating a mess in your kitchen! Scoop some ready-made pancake mix into a bowl, crack an egg, add some milk, and you’re ready to start cooking!
metaData.Nutritional Data:
Attributes Per Serving (19.5g)
Energy 72kcal
Total Fat 1.1g
Saturated Fat 0.4g
Trans Fat 0g
Carbohydrate 13.6g
Sugars 2.5g
Dietary Fibre 0.4g
Protein 1.7g
Salt 0.4g
Sodium 169mg
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:For 8 to 10 pancakes:
• 1 cup Betty Crocker pancake mix
• 2?3 cup (160ml) milk
•1 egg 1 tbsp oil1. Heat the pan on medium heat until drop of water sizzle and evaporate quickly. Grease the pan if necessary.2. Add all ingredients to a bowl and stir with a fork until well combined.
For thinner pancakes, add more milk and for thicker pancakes, add more pancake mix.3. For each pancake, pour 1?4 cup batter onto the hot pan.4. Cook till bubbles break on the surface and edges begin to dry.5. Turn the pancake and cook the other side for 1 minute or till golden brown.Others: Dress up your pancakes! Add blueberries, chocolate chips, or sliced bananas into the batter just before flipping.
metaData.Storage Information:
• Refrigerate upon openingHow to freeze & reheat pancakes:
1. Let the pancakes cool to room temperature
2. Layer between sheets of parchment paper and seal the pancakes in a zipper bag.
3. To reheat, spread a few frozen pancakes on a plate in a single layer
4. Heat it up in the microwave for about 30 to 45 seconds
5. Pop them in the toaster

metaData.Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Sugar, Rice Flour, Soy Flour, Edible Vegetable Oil (Palm Oil), Dextrose, Acidity Regulator, INS500(ii), Acidity Regulator, INS541(i), Salt, Natural Butter Flavouring, Milk Solids, Natural Cream Flavouring, Acidity Regulator: (INS341(i), INS170(i). Contains acidity regulator as permitted food conditioner. Contains permitted flavouring substance.

metaData.Key Information:
• Our Redman Chocolate Muffin Premix is a great and easy ingredient for bakers. Make chocolate muffins with no difficulty! It is convenient and simple to use while recreating great taste, suitable for both professional and home bakers.
• How to use : Follow the directions on the packet to make these delicious chocolate muffins. Mix in ripe bananas, marshmallows, nuts or chocolate chips to vary the flavour. Top these muffins with chia seeds or pretzels for that extra crunch. It can also be used as a base for your own recipe.
metaData.Storage Information: Store at room temperature. As a precaution, however, it is recommended to keep certain products away from heat and humidity (see recommendations on the package).
